scripts.db:setup: wrangler d1 execute hidden-lodge-db --local --file=migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute hidden-lodge-db --local --file=migrations/0002_roster_cache.sql
scripts.db:setup:prod: wrangler d1 execute hidden-lodge-db --remote --file=migrations/0001_initial.sql && wrangler d1 execute hidden-lodge-db --remote --file=migrations/0002_roster_cache.sql
